characters.name: Agent Trout
characters.description: Agent TroutCurrentYoungCharacteristicsSpeciesHumanEthnicityAmericanGenderMaleTraitsHairGreyProfessional StatusAffiliation(s)National Wildlife ControlOccupation(s)Agent from the National Wildlife Control (Ingenuine) (Formerly)Criminal MastermindPersonal StatusStatusAlive (incarcerated)Friend(s)His ReinforcementsPizza RatEnemy(s)The BearsCaged BearsOfficer MurphyChloe ParkRanger TabesLucyDarrell SaragosaMediaFirst Appearance"We Bare Bears: The Movie"Voice ActorMarc Evan Jackson Agent Buck Troutis the main antagonist ofWe Bare Bears: The Movie, and the overarching antagonist of the entireWe Bare Bearsseries, despite not appearing in it. characters.name: Albino Alligator
characters.description: Albino AlligatorCharacteristicsSpeciesAlligatorRaceReptileGenderMaleTraitsEyesRedMediaFirst Appearance"Chloe and Ice Bear" TheAlbino Alligatoris a rare crocodilian that resides within The Natural Science Museum. As well as living in the museum for scientific purposes, he is also used as an advertisement campaign. He made his first and only appearance in the episode "Chloe and Ice Bear". His scales are white, and his eyes are red, just as most albino creatures are.

characters.name: Alyssa
characters.description: AlyssaCharacteristicsSpeciesHumanGenderFemalePronounsShe/HerTraitsHairBrownEyesBlackProfessional StatusOccupation(s)College StudentPersonal StatusStatusAliveMediaFirst Appearance"Chloe"Alyssais introduced byPanda Bearin "My Clique", as a girl studying to be a doctor when she isn't serving coffee. She also made an appearance in "Chloe". She has brown hair and black eyes. She wears large red glasses, a dark purple sweater with a light purple circle on two of the elbows, light gray pants and carries a purse.

characters.name: Amanda
characters.description: AmandaCharacteristicsSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleAge18AppearanceOutfitPink ShirtGreen ShortsKnee High SocksTan ShoesAccessoriesPanda HatTraitsHairBlackProfessional StatusAffiliation(s)California UniversityOccupation(s)College studentPersonal StatusStatusAliveFriend(s)Panda Bear(possible love interest)MediaFirst AppearanceSummer LoveVoice ActorStephanie Sheh Amandais a minor character that appears in the episodeSummer Love. She is a customer at the same Boba Shop thatPandawas at in the episodeSummer Love.  She later meets Panda face to face at the end of the episode when he returned her lost phone. Amanda has black, puffy hair and fair complexion and wears eyeliner. She wears a panda-shaped hat and a pink shirt with matching denim shorts. For her footwear, Amanda wears low-cut socks and brown shoes. She can be seen wearing a panda backpack and possesses a phone with a casing designed with a panda in pink background.

characters.name: Amelia
characters.description: AmeliaCharacteristicsSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleAppearanceOutfitLabcoatAccessoriesHeadbandTraitsHairBlondeEyesBlackProfessional StatusOccupation(s)ScientistPersonal StatusFriend(s)Mad Scientist(Boyfriend)MediaFirst AppearanceSummer LoveVoice ActorStephanie Sheh Ameliais the lost love of theMad Scientistwho was mentioned in the episodeSummer Love. She is a fellow scientist. She didn't see the Mad Scientist again after she was sent to space. Her name resemblesAmanda, althoughPandadoes not learn it until later. Although she is mostly seen in monochrome filtered flashbacks, she has light skin, long, blonde hair that had been braided, black eyes and eyeliner, a lab coat with a blue shirt underneath and a dark pink headband, which is shown in the pictures on the Mad Scientist's chalkboard.

characters.description: AmyCharacteristicsSpeciesHumanEthnicityCaucasianGenderFemalePronounsShe/HerTraitsHairLight BrownEyesBlackProfessional StatusAffiliation(s)California UniversityOccupation(s)College StudentPersonal StatusStatusAliveFriend(s)Chloe Park(AfterMy Clique)Other FriendsMediaFirst AppearanceMy CliqueVoice ActorNiki Yang Amyis one of theCollege Studentswho is inChloe Park's biochemistry class. She leaves her phone number for Chloe inMy Clique. It is taken byPanda Bear. She is a friend of Chloe's as well. She has a tertiary role in her first appearance. She has light skin, black eyes and eyeliner as well as long light brown hair tied in a ponytail. She wears a blue hoodie, gray pants, blue and gray shoes along with a purple backpack.

characters.name: Andy Bangs
characters.description: AndrewAndyBangsNickname(s)A.B. (Entourage)Andy (Nom Nom)Loser (Nom Nom)The Rotten, Ugly, No-Good Andy Bangs (Nom Nom)Jumpscare Buffoon (Nom Nom)Scaredy Baby (Nom Nom)CharacteristicsSpeciesHumanRaceHuman (White)GenderMaleAgeAround 11 or 12PronounsHe/HimTraitsHeight2'6" (Same asNom Nom's height)HairLight brown with blond highlightsEyesBlackProfessional StatusOccupation(s)Internet CelebrityPersonal StatusFriend(s)His entourage (Presumably)Enemy(s)Nom NomGrizzly BearPanda BearIce BearMediaFirst AppearanceNom Nom's EntourageVoice ActorBo Burnham AndrewAndyBangsis a childinternet star. The videos he mainly creates are public pranks where he pops out of inconspicuous places and shoutsBang!to surprise people. Some find him entertaining, but many find his content annoying andPandawas initially frightened by him. He's known as AndyBangsonline because of this and Bangs is most likely not his real surname though this remains unconfirmed. He lives inSan Francisco. Andy made his only appearance in the episodeNom Nom's Entourage. Andy is about as tall asChloeand can be assumed to be around her age. He has medium length light brown hair with bangs dyed with blond highlights. He has freckles on his cheeks and large front teeth, though not large enough to stick out when his mouth is closed. His signature apparel is a vibrant orange pullover hoodie with a lime green collar and pouch and black sleeves, along with bright blue baggy jeans and white sneakers with black soles and laces.

characters.name: Annie
characters.description: AnnieCharacteristicsRaceHumanGenderFemaleTraitsHairGingerEyesBlackPersonal StatusRelative(s)Unnamed Infant SonPaul(Husband)Unnamed MotherFriend(s)The BearsEnemy(s)NoneMediaFirst Appearance"Yard Sale"Voice ActorGrey Griffin Annieis a minor character. She made her first and only appearance in the episode "Yard Sale". Annie is fairly chubby, even when not pregnant. She has medium-length, fluffy, ginger hair and freckles. She is seen wearing lipstick, pearl earrings, a purple shirt, denim shorts and tan sandals.

characters.name: Ari Curd
characters.description: Ari CurdCharacteristicsSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleTraitsHairBrownEyesBlackProfessional StatusAffiliation(s)GoogsOccupation(s)Founder of GoogsPersonal StatusFriend(s)ShmorbyEnemy(s)The BearsMediaFirst AppearanceGoogsVoice ActorJane Leeves Ari Curdis a minor antagonist inWe Bare Bears, who first appeared inGoogs. In virtual reality, she sentPandato space because she had no choice. Ari has a short height and has a slightly larger figure than most characters. She has short brown hair with small tufts of it sticking out at the sides, a large bunch of it in the middle, and the typical black eyes. She wears a thick blue jacket with drawstrings near the hood, 2 pockets on both sides of her and aShmorbyimage on the right of her jacket. She also wears a white T-shirt beneath it, black jeans and see-through glasses with black rims on the top of them.

characters.name: Background Characters
characters.description: Background CharactersCharacteristicsRaceHumansMediaFirst AppearancePilot"Our Stuff" (main series)TheBackground CharactersofWe Bare Bearsare characters seen in the backgrounds of eachepisodeandshortto help giveSan Franciscoits depth and diversity. These characters have little to no bearing on the plots of the show. Background characters are never given names and they very rarely speak. These characters made their first appearance in thePilotand their main series debut in "Our Stuff" and have appeared in every episode and short since.

characters.name: Badger
characters.description: BadgerCharacteristicsRaceHumanGenderMaleTraitsHairBlondEyesBlackProfessional StatusOccupation(s)SurvivalistTV Show StarMediaFirst AppearancePrimal Badgeris an Australian survivalist and the star of the showBadger in the Wild. He made his first appearance in the episodePrimaland then his second appearance in the episodeChristmas Parties. Badger has tanned skin. He has long, blond hair, a big, bushy goatee and black eyes. He has very large muscles. He's usually seen wearing his signature green tank top, black vest and khaki cargo pants, along with his usual green headband.

characters.name: Bagel Rat
characters.description: Bagel RatCharacteristicsSpeciesUrban RatRaceUrban RatGenderMaleTraitsHairGrayEyesBlackPersonal StatusFriend(s)The BearsMediaFirst AppearanceSubway Bagel Ratis an urban rat that loves hoarding bagel-shaped objects into his underground room located in their local subway station. Bagel Rat is a urban rat with a long tail and big ears. His eyes are black and very small. Their paws are small, which is to be expected of their size. Bagel Rat also uses a fitness tracker that was given byGrizzly Bear. Which, coincidentally, looks like a bagel. And it's a clear cultural reference to Pizza Rat.

characters.name: Barry Charles
characters.description: Barry CharlesCharacteristicsSpeciesHumanGenderMaleTraitsHairBlackEyesBlackProfessional StatusAffiliation(s)Techies Gang(Leader)Occupation(s)Leader ofTechies GangPersonal StatusStatusAliveRelative(s)Mr. Charles(Father)Friend(s)Techies GangEnemy(s)Ice Bear(Archenemy)YanaMediaFirst AppearanceIcy NightsVoice ActorKevin McHale Barry Charlesis one of theantagonistsofWe Bare Bears, arguably the most significant antagonist in the series. Barry is a young adult, tall with small black eyes. His hair is high and black. He wears a brown polo shirt along with long pants with the same color. In addition to wearing long brown shoes. His body is quite long but thin. His neck is slightly elongated and his nose is pinched. In the episodeIcy Nights II, Barry is injured and a scar on the side of his face is formed.

characters.name: Barry's Robots
characters.description: Barry's robot minion. Barry's Robotsare robots controlled byBarryto do his bidding. They consist of a giant muscular robot body with a smartphone as their head. They are quite easy to dispose of since if the smartphone is knocked out of their body, they will stop functioning. They have some level of sentience since it's shown that they can express emotion through the screen of their smartphone head in the form of emoji. Barry controls the strongest robot.
